name: EdwLoadInterPlnBillDtlFRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND SUBJ_CD='FINANCE_INTRPLNBILL' AND EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T INNER JOIN cte ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE T.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
JobName:
EdwLoadInterPlnBillDtlFRunCycUpdt_EE

EDW InterPlanBillDtl Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS InterPlanBillDtl with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is greater than or equal to the current run cycle used for extracting.
